improve yield without predictive alignment. Across compression sweeps, real
factor archives, and LLM-SRBench tasks, hybrid gains concentrate in weakly
represented but target-bearing directions and vanish as the hypothesis space ap-
proaches full rank. The framework turns LLM-guided discovery from generic
